routeSignals: /api/image-gen is deployed as a dynamic function
/api/image-gen/assets/[assetId] is deployed as a dynamic function
/api/v1/health and /api/v1/public-config are deployed as public dynamic routes
knownWarnings: Existing Next.js edge runtime warning: using edge runtime on a page disables static generation for that page.

probe.observedPattern: Vercel share access cookie allowed the strict probe to reach the NEXUS app layer. Public health/public-config returned 200, legacy routes returned 404, and protected spoof-only routes returned non-success statuses.

imageGenerationBoundary.meaning: Unauthenticated image generation is rejected before provider execution on the R93 harness preview.

passedSignals: protected spoof-only routes rejected with non-success status
legacy routes except image-gen returned production 404

blockingFinding.reason: The public production domain appears to expose the image generation route as an app-layer endpoint while the v22 source gate still models it as a legacy production-blocked route.

behavior: Reads VERCEL_AUTOMATION_BYPASS_SECRET from the environment when present.
Sends x-vercel-protection-bypass only when a bypass secret is configured.
Reports only header-present or not-configured; it never prints the secret.
Adds platformProtectionLikely so preview auth failures are not confused with app-layer permission failures.
Reads AUTH_BOUNDARY_LIVE_COOKIE_JAR or AUTH_BOUNDARY_LIVE_COOKIE when preview protection is accessed through a temporary Vercel share URL.
Parses Netscape cookie jars including #HttpOnly_ Vercel protection cookies without printing cookie values.

nextRequiredRounds: Run owner/editor/viewer/new-account screen matrix against the strict-preview-green deployment.
Convert temporary share-cookie access into either documented VERCEL_AUTOMATION_BYPASS_SECRET usage or a repeatable authenticated preview verification setup.
Promote to production only after the screen matrix passes and the generated media path is verified by non-owner writable accounts.

previousBlockedPreviewDeployment.commitMessage: fix: harden workflow pro supabase policies

probe.observedPattern: public health and public config returned 401 together with legacy and protected routes, indicating the request did not reliably reach the NEXUS app layer.
